attributes.background_ability: The Hunt Never Ends — Once per day, declare a target. You gain +2 to all rolls that involve tracking, hunting, or hitting that one target in combat. The target does not need to be known to you; it can just be something you are hunting.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Custom Revolver; original: Custom revolver
attributes.weapon_2_description: Based on Collapsible Baton; original: Collapsible baton
attributes.inventory_notes: Stun cuffs; Cigarette case filled with encrypted data chips

attributes.background_ability: Just Someone in the Crowd — Once per day, as long as you are in or near a crowd, you can instantly lose any pursuit. Gain +2 to Stealth for the purposes of breaking and entering.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Switchblade; original: Switchblade tucked in your boot
attributes.weapon_2_description: Based on Old Revolver; original: Reliable old revolver
attributes.active_bonus_1_condition: Always on unless GM rules otherwise
attributes.inventory_notes: Climbing claws for scaling mega buildings

attributes.background_ability: Badge Intimidation — Once per day, flash your old credentials and force someone to hesitate or comply, even if you have not been a cop in years. Gain +2 when trying to Bully any Civilian-type NPCs.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Aged Police-Issue Shotgun; original: Aged police-issue shotgun
attributes.weapon_2_description: Based on Stun Baton; original: Broken stun baton that still works sometimes
attributes.cyberware_1_traits: Cyberware, Thermal Vision, HUD Time/Map Overlay
attributes.inventory_notes: Old department boots; Department radio that stopped responding; Handcuffs; Bulletproof flask

attributes.background_ability: Overclocked Brain — Once per day, you can either push your neural processor to triple speed, allowing you to use Hacking twice in a single action, or reroll a failed Hacking attempt.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Electro Knife; original: Compact electro-knife
attributes.weapon_2_description: Based on Smart Pistol; original: Smart pistol with a safety override
attributes.inventory_notes: LED-coated jacket that cycles through old hacker slogans; Programming socks; Illegal firmware mod; Bottle of anti-seizure meds

attributes.background_ability: Blink and You Miss Me — Once per day, move twice as far in one Movement action, ignoring terrain penalties.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Compact SMG; original: Compact submachine gun
attributes.weapon_2_description: Based on Collapsible Baton; original: Collapsible baton
attributes.inventory_notes: Reinforced gloves; Hacked GPS; Fake delivery credentials; Undelivered package

attributes.background_ability: War Never Changes — You never freeze in combat. If you are ambushed, you still get a turn before anything hits you.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Heavily Modified Assault Rifle; original: Heavily modified assault rifle
attributes.weapon_2_description: Based on Combat Knife; original: Knife with someone’s name scratched into the blade
attributes.active_bonus_1_condition: Always on unless GM rules otherwise
attributes.inventory_notes: Stolen military commlink; Old combat fatigues; Expired rations; Crumpled photograph of old unit

attributes.background_ability: Lady Luck — Once per day, if you roll a 20 on a D20, replace the result with a 2. Once per day, if you have sacrificed a 20 result, you may replace any other result with a Critical Success.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Rusty Sawed Off Shotgun; original: Sawed-off shotgun
attributes.weapon_2_description: Based on Rusted Trench Knife; original: Rusted trench knife
attributes.inventory_notes: Fake identity chip; Long jacket with gang patches hastily removed; Cargo pants; Very snazzy hat; Hidden gang tattoo; Lucky coin stolen from the wrong person

attributes.background_ability: Built Like a Tank — As long as you are repairing something that belongs to you or an ally, you gain +2 to Jury-Rigging and Engineering.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Power Wrench; original: Power wrench
attributes.weapon_2_description: Based on Old Revolver; original: Old revolver
attributes.inventory_notes: Grease-stained coveralls; Heavy-duty work boots; Toolbox full of borrowed corporate tech; Love letter from someone you ghosted

attributes.background_ability: Rat Runs the Maze — Once per day, you can find a secret, unmonitored path through the city: alleyways, sewer tunnels, maintenance shafts. Even in total lockdown, you always have an escape.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Rusty Switch Blade; original: Rusted switchblade
attributes.weapon_2_description: Based on Ancient Semi-auto Pistol; original: Ancient semi-auto pistol
attributes.active_bonus_1_condition: Always on unless GM rules otherwise
attributes.inventory_notes: Mismatched urban wear; Ratty hoodie with corporate logos from five years ago; Burner phone at 20% battery; Metro card with enough credits for one last ride

attributes.background_ability: See What I Want You to See — Once per day, you can use the GhostWalk hack without having to roll for success.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Electro-dart Launcher; original: Electro-dart launcher
attributes.inventory_notes: Illegal AR projector; Homemade flashbang; Haptic-coated bodysuit

attributes.background_ability: Get There Fast — Once per Day, you can double the Movement speed of a Vehicle or Mech for one Round.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Compact Holdout Pistol; original: Compact holdout pistol
attributes.inventory_notes: Piloting speedware; Cool aviator shades

attributes.background_ability: The Muse Smiles — Once per Day, gain a sudden burst of inspiration, allowing you to gain Advantage (1D4 + your Performance) on a single Non-Combat roll.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Switchblade; original: Switchblade found on the streets
attributes.inventory_notes: Baggy jeans; Loose sweater covered in paint stains; Nine pirated Abode products

attributes.background_ability: Faith Drives Me — Once per Combat, your faith keeps you going. Heal 1D4 HP as a Free Action.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Dagger; original: Blessed dagger
attributes.weapon_2_description: Based on Shock Stick; original: Shock-stick
attributes.inventory_notes: Holy relic: reprogrammed AI core; Hand-sewn priestly robes; Corporate combat boots; Flask of sacred oil, probably combat drugs

attributes.background_ability: Meat is Weak — Once per Combat as a Bonus Action, you can patch up yourself or an Ally. Roll a DC: 10 First Aid check; on a success, you or your ally heals for 1D6.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Bone Saw; original: Bone saw
attributes.weapon_2_description: Based on Syringe Gun; original: Syringe gun filled with mystery anesthetic
attributes.inventory_notes: Mobile surgery kit; Bloodstained surgical scrubs; Reinforced apron; Box of untested cybernetic augments; Flask of medicinal whiskey

attributes.background_ability: Say hello to my little (fake) friend! — You have a collection of high-end, hyper-realistic recreations of popular Samurai gear. All of it is non-functional. Once per day, you can produce a fake version of a Tier-three piece of equipment.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Officially Branded Katana; original: Officially branded katana
attributes.cyberware_1_traits: Cyberware, Thermal Vision, HUD Time/Map Overlay
attributes.inventory_notes: Body pillow of your favourite Samurai; Jacket with your favourite Samurai on the back; Ratty band shirt; Music sticks

attributes.background_ability: Oh, What’s This? — Once per day you can happen upon a useful little gizmo, weapon, or piece of equipment worth below 300Cr from the Civilian Gear tables.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Old Revolver; original: Old revolver
attributes.weapon_2_description: Based on Bent Baseball Bat; original: Bent baseball bat
attributes.inventory_notes: One high-end designer sneaker; One sandal; Dirty old cargo pants; Homemade cloak; Out-of-tune Geiger counter; Duffle bag

attributes.background_ability: I Studied For This! — Once per day, recall something you have studied, gaining +2 to any non-combat skill for a single roll.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Compact Holdout Pistol; original: Compact holdout pistol
attributes.weapon_2_description: Based on Retractable Stun Baton; original: Retractable stun baton
attributes.inventory_notes: Tailored corporate slacks; Cyber-optimal shades; School polo you forgot to return; Personal encrypted datapad; Corporate passkey for older doors; Half-full bottle of overpriced synth-scotch

attributes.background_ability: Glitch Mode — Once per Combat, as a Free Action, activate Latent Experimental Cyberware. Roll a D4 for a one-turn effect: super speed, pain resistance, enhanced reflexes, or better vision. Afterward, lose 1D4 HP.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Serrated Scalpel; original: Serrated scalpel
attributes.inventory_notes: Disposable mask; Sterile hospital scrubs; Scavenged jacket; Corporate barcode tattoo; Vial of mystery serum

attributes.background_ability: Knockout Blow — Once per day, as a Free Action, you can attempt to Stun an enemy after making a successful Melee hit. The enemy rolls against DC 10 Save to avoid being Stunned for one turn.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Titanium Plated Knuckledusters; original: Titanium-plated knuckledusters
attributes.weapon_2_description: Based on Combat Knife; original: Combat knife
attributes.cyberware_2_traits: Cyberware, once per Combat, gain 10 Feet of Movement as a Free Action
attributes.inventory_notes: Bloodstained tank top; Fingerless gloves; Betting slips from old fights

attributes.background_ability: One Last Encore — Once per day, as a Bonus Action, draw all attention, including enemy aggression, to yourself for one Round. All opponents in a combat scene within 30 Feet must roll a DC: 10 plus your Performance Save. On failure, they must include you in their next Attack Action.
attributes.weapon_1_description: Based on Microphone Stand; original: Microphone stand reinforced for fights
attributes.active_bonus_1_condition: Always on unless GM rules otherwise
attributes.inventory_notes: Aged leather jacket covered in tour patches; Ripped jeans; Broken holo-projector of your greatest performance; Signed poster of a rival you hate; Guitar case with a secret compartment
